claimText: Iron Dome, David's Sling, Arrow, and Barak Magen are air defence systems belonging to Israel.
evidenceExcerpt: Israel's systems include Iron Dome (short range), David's Sling (short to medium/long), Arrow (long range), and Barak Magen (advanced naval).
examUse: Correct-pair questions matching air defence systems to their respective countries.
distractorHooks: Attributing these systems to the USA or Russia
Confusing David's Sling or Arrow with offensive ballistic missiles rather than defence systems

claimText: Barak Magen is an advanced naval air defence system developed by Israel.
evidenceExcerpt: Israel's systems include... Barak Magen (advanced naval).
examUse: Statement-based questions on the specific deployment domain of global defence systems.
distractorHooks: Claiming Barak Magen is a land-based mobile SAM system
Attributing Barak Magen to Iran or India

claimText: THAAD is a United States air defence system designed to intercept ballistic missiles.
evidenceExcerpt: USA's systems include THAAD (intercepts ballistic missiles)
examUse: Statement-based questions on the capabilities and origin of the THAAD system.
distractorHooks: Attributing THAAD to Israel or NATO exclusively
Claiming THAAD is an anti-drone swarm system rather than for ballistic missiles

claimText: The PATRIOT system is a mobile surface-to-air missile (SAM) defence system belonging to the USA.
examUse: Correct-pair questions matching the PATRIOT system to the USA.
distractorHooks: Claiming PATRIOT is an air-to-air missile system
Attributing the PATRIOT system to European nations or Israel

claimText: Golden Dome is an upcoming United States air defence system that utilizes surveillance and interceptor satellites.
evidenceExcerpt: USA's systems include... the upcoming Golden Dome (surveillance and interceptor satellites).
examUse: Statement-based questions distinguishing Golden Dome from Iron Dome and identifying its space-based nature.
distractorHooks: Confusing Golden Dome with Israel's Iron Dome
Claiming Golden Dome is a ground-based radar network rather than a satellite-based system

claimText: China's HQ-9 air defence system is inspired by the Russian S-300 system.
evidenceExcerpt: China's HQ-9 system is inspired by the Russian S-300.
examUse: Statement-based questions on the origin and technological lineage of China's air defence systems.
distractorHooks: Claiming HQ-9 is an indigenous Indian system
Stating HQ-9 is reverse-engineered from the US PATRIOT system
